ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "months_as_customer" INTEGER /* Number of months the customer has been with the company */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "insured_zip" INTEGER /* ZIP code of the insured */,
  "insured_sex" TEXT /* Sex of the insured */,
  "insured_education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the insured */,
  "insured_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the insured */,
  "insured_hobbies" TEXT /* Hobbies of the insured */,
  "insured_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the insured */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Full address of the customer */,
  "customer_city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "customer_state" TEXT /* State of the customer */,
  "customer_country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "customer_marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "customer_children" INTEGER /* Number of children the customer has */,
  "customer_income" REAL /* Annual income of the customer */,
  "customer_credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  "customer_employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who holds the policy */,
  "policy_bind_date" TEXT /* Date the policy was bound */,
  "policy_state" TEXT /* State where the policy is active */,
  "policy_csl" TEXT /* Combined single limit for liability claims */,
  "policy_deductable" INTEGER /* Deductible amount for the policy */,
  "policy_annual_premium" REAL /* Annual premium charged for the policy */,
  "umbrella_limit" INTEGER /* Umbrella limit for additional coverage */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of policy (e.g., auto, home, life) */,
  "policy_effective_date" TEXT /* Date the policy becomes effective */,
  "policy_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the policy expires */,
  "policy_coverage_limit" INTEGER /* Maximum coverage limit for the policy */,
  "policy_payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of premium payments */,
  "policy_agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent who sold the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_policies_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims" (
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each claim */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy under which the claim is filed */,
  "incident_date" TEXT /* Date the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., vehicle theft, collision) */,
  "collision_type" TEXT /* Type of collision (e.g., side, rear) */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident */,
  "authorities_contacted" TEXT /* Authorities contacted regarding the incident */,
  "incident_state" TEXT /* State where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_city" TEXT /* City where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_location" TEXT /* Specific location of the incident */,
  "incident_hour_of_the_day" INTEGER /* Hour of the day when the incident occurred */,
  "claim_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the claim */,
  "claim_status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim */,
  "claim_adjuster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the adjuster handling the claim */,
  "claim_estimated_loss" REAL /* Estimated loss amount for the claim */,
  "claim_actual_loss" REAL /* Actual loss amount for the claim */,
  "claim_fraud_score" REAL /* Score indicating the likelihood of fraud */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("claim_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the claim involving the vehicle */,
  "auto_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "auto_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "auto_year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "fraud_reported" INTEGER /* Indicates if fraud has been reported for this vehicle */,
  "vehicle_vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "vehicle_license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model_year" INTEGER /* Model year of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_mileage" INTEGER /* Mileage of the vehicle at the time of the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident record */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the claim associated with this incident */,
  "property_damage" TEXT /* Indicates if there was property damage */,
  "bodily_injuries" INTEGER /* Count of bodily injuries reported */,
  "witnesses" INTEGER /* Total witnesses for the incident */,
  "police_report_available" INTEGER /* Indicates if a police report is available */,
  "total_claim_amount" REAL /* Total claim amount filed for the incident */,
  "injury_claim" REAL /* Amount claimed for injury-related expenses */,
  "property_claim" REAL /* Amount claimed for property damage */,
  "vehicle_claim" REAL /* Amount claimed for vehicle repairs */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the incident */,
  "incident_weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the incident */,
  "incident_traffic_conditions" TEXT /* Traffic conditions during the incident */,
  "incident_road_type" TEXT /* Type of road where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_witness_names" TEXT /* Names of the witnesses */,
  "incident_witness_contacts" TEXT /* Contact information of the witnesses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claims_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for claims history record */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the policy associated with this claim */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the claim being processed */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date when the claim was processed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the claim */,
  "history_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the history record */,
  "history_agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent who processed the claim */,
  "history_adjuster_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the adjuster who reviewed the claim */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_history_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES policies ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claims_history_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "claim_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "claim_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the claim for which the payment is made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of payment made for the claim */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "payment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_claim_payments_claim_id FOREIGN KEY ("claim_id") REFERENCES claims ("claim_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loss_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loss report */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who submitted the report */,
  "loss_date" TEXT /* Date the loss occurred */,
  "loss_description" TEXT /* Description of the loss */,
  "loss_amount" REAL /* Amount claimed for the loss */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the loss */,
  "report_evidence" TEXT /* Evidence provided for the loss */,
  "report_fraud_score" REAL /* Score indicating the likelihood of fraud */,
  "report_agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the agent who received the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loss_reports_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
